cases.description: Gate runner dispatches this skill at plan→decompose transition
cases.prompt: [Internal] Gate runner invokes gate-plan-coverage with plan_artifact_path, workflow_id, intent_summary.
expectations: Skill runs as a forked subagent (disable-model-invocation: true)
Skill reads manifest events to extract intent decisions and success criteria
Skill returns structured JSON conforming to schemas/gate-result.schema.json

cases.description: Plan must address every success criterion from intent
cases.prompt: [Internal] Intent has 5 success criteria; plan covers all 5.
expectations: Skill maps each success criterion to a section/task in the plan
Output lists which criterion maps to which plan section

cases.description: If plan does not address a criterion, gate fails
cases.prompt: [Internal] Intent has criterion 'export must support CSV and JSON'; plan only addresses CSV.
expectations: Skill identifies the missing criterion (JSON export not in plan)
Output includes the unmet criterion with a one-line gap description
suggested_action points to the plan section that should cover JSON

cases.description: Output is strictly JSON, never prose
expectations: Output is valid JSON parsable by the gate runner
Output contains check_id, verdict, summary, evidence, suggested_action, tokens_consumed
